response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, which aligns with the role. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-native AI design on AWS/GCP/Azure — all central to this Staff Forward Deployed Engineer position. No evidence of customer-facing technical discovery leadership or 8+ years specifically building AI-driven solutions.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and AWS experience
Track record of technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, FOSS4G)
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years building production AI/GenAI solutions — AI work appears to be recent (2025+)
Resume does not mention RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No clear evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq
No evidence of customer-facing technical leadership at enterprise scale
